title: Duanmu Ji
content:
Chased 
Wang Lin
, all the way from the 
Sea of Devils
 to 
Xuan Wu
, for three years until he captured him. Together with 
Wang Qingyue
 he brought Wang Lin to the 
Chaotic Broken Stars
.

Appearance
[
]

Green robed old man with an Golden Plum Flower on his shirt. He has a green gourd.

Plot
[
]

He need Wang Lin help with his Death Spell to pass 
Land of the Ancient God
 third trial. In panic of Desolate Beast attack, he enter first trial together with Wang Qingyue and got separated with others. Wang Lin see the two again in third trial fighting Wandering Souls. After that the two captured by demonized Hunchback Meng and thrown them away to a rift that lead to Blood Sea where they will turned into a demon by Tuo Sen.
